subcodes.title: Li-Ismi’l-Akhir
subcodes.first_line: Verily, I am God, no God is there but Me, the Last, the Last. I have ever been from time immemorial and shall forever remain from time immemorial, inasmuch as I created whatsoever I created from a beginning that hath no beginning [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: بسم الله الاخر الاخر. اننی انا الله لا اله الا انا الآخر الآخر لم یزل کنت ازلاً قدیما و لا یزال لاکونن ازلاً قدیما بما قد خلقت ما قد خلقت من اول الذی لا اول له
subcodes.subjects: @Manifestation of God as mediator, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @progressive revelation; renewal of religion
